fetchStatus.message: Skipped live Spotify API fetch because SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID and/or SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET were not available. The script/report framework was created and Spotify variables were documented in .env.local.example.

manualReviewItems.subject: Spotify API credentials
